leadText: If you were looking for the move that is known as Low Kick in English, see Low Kick. Low Sweep (Japanese: ローキック Low Kick) is a damage-dealing Fighting-type move introduced in Generation V. It is: TM47 from Generation V to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. TM75 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM27 in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM039 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM113 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation V [ edit | edit source ] Low Sweep inflicts damage and lowers the target's Speed stat by one stage. Generation VI onwards [ edit | edit source ] Low Sweep's power changed from 60 to 65.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 The user attacks the target's legs swiftly, reducing the target's Speed stat. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The user makes a swift attack on the target's legs, which lowers the target's Speed stat. ZA The user attacks targets with a swift move aimed at their legs. This also makes targets move more slowly for a short time.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI It damages an enemy. It also lowers its Travel Speed. S MD MD RT DX It damages an enemy. It also lowers the enemy's Travel Speed.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Low Sweep appears to be inspired by an attack called a leg sweep, which is a mainstay attack in a wide variety of martial arts. It is designed to trip opponents. Low Sweep is the only Fighting-type Clever move.
